hotel.name: Golden Lotus Hotel
hotel.description: Yangon city center hotel for business and family travelers.

policies.earlyCheckIn: Early check-in depends on room availability and may include an extra charge.
policies.lateCheckOut: Late check-out is possible until 14:00 if available.
policies.cancellation: Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before check-in.
policies.children: Children under 6 years can stay free when using existing beds.

amenities.internet: Free high-speed Wi-Fi is available in all rooms and public areas.
amenities.breakfast: Breakfast is included for all direct bookings.
amenities.airportTransfer: Airport transfer can be arranged with an extra fee.
amenities.parking: Free parking is available for guests.

venueInfo.bookingPolicy: Venue reservations should be confirmed at least 3 days in advance and are subject to availability.
venueInfo.deposit: A 30 percent deposit is required to confirm venue rental.
venueInfo.catering: Outside catering is not allowed. In-house catering packages are available.
venueInfo.equipment: Additional AV equipment, decoration, and event support staff can be arranged with extra charges.
venueInfo.contact: For venue rental, guests can contact the events team at events@goldenlotus.example or +95 9 444 000 222.

location.airportDistance: Approximately 35 minutes by car from Yangon International Airport.

bookingInfo.payment: Payment can be made at check-in or guaranteed by card for selected rates.
bookingInfo.confirmation: A confirmation ID is generated after successful booking.
bookingInfo.bookingNote: For now, guests should complete reservations through the hotel website or by contacting the reservations team directly.
